name: T3Code Server (forked, bearer-auth)
description: Installs and supervises the forked T3Code server (bearer-auth branch) inside a devcontainer. The server listens on 0.0.0.0:<port> and validates inbound relay requests via a shared-secret file bind-mounted from the host.

version.description: Artifact release tag of the forked t3code server to install. Use 'latest' to always pull the most recent release, or pin to a specific tag (e.g. 't3code-server-v1.2.3') for reproducibility.

port.description: Port the t3code server will bind on (0.0.0.0:<port>). Caddy reaches the server on dev-ingress at this port. String type is used for safe substitution in the env file sourced by the supervise script.

host.description: Host/interface the t3code server binds to. Defaults to 0.0.0.0 so the relay can probe the server from the shared Docker network.

secretPath.description: Filesystem path inside the container where the shared relay secret file is bind-mounted from the host. The server reads this file and requires matching X-Relay-Secret headers on inbound requests. Must match the mount target in the consumer devcontainer.json.

baseDir.description: Optional explicit T3CODE_HOME/base directory for server state. Takes precedence over stateParentDir and existing T3CODE_HOME. Leave empty to use stateParentDir or the server default.

stateParentDir.description: Optional durable parent directory for server state. When set, the feature uses <stateParentDir>/<DEVCONTAINER_ID-or-HOSTNAME> as T3CODE_HOME so each devcontainer gets isolated persistent state.

workspaceHome.description: Optional workspace cwd passed to the server. Leave empty to use WORKSPACE_HOME from containerEnv when present. This prevents the server from bootstrapping a project at /.

runAsUser.description: Linux user that runs the T3Code server process. The supervisor still starts as the container entrypoint, then drops privileges with runuser when running as root. Set to empty to run as the entrypoint user.

sshAuthSock.description: Stable SSH_AUTH_SOCK path exported to the T3Code server process. The supervisor keeps this path symlinked to the VS Code forwarded socket when one appears under /tmp.

tailscale.description: Install and start tailscaled in the devcontainer. Enabled by default so relay clients can connect directly to the devcontainer over the tailnet.

tailscaleAuthKeyPath.description: Path to a mounted Tailscale auth key file. The feature reads this file at container startup; the auth key is never configured as an environment variable.

tailscaleHostname.description: Optional hostname to use when joining the tailnet. Leave empty to derive one from the container hostname.

tailscaleStateDir.description: Optional tailscaled state directory. Leave empty to store state under the resolved T3CODE_HOME when possible, or /var/lib/tailscale.

tailscaleServe.description: Enable the T3Code server's Tailscale Serve integration by default.

tailscaleServePort.description: HTTPS port passed to Tailscale Serve when tailscaleServe is enabled.

tailnetDnsName.description: Optional explicit tailnet DNS name for the T3Code server to advertise. Leave empty to resolve it from tailscale status at startup.
